This '''[[Jedi academy|academy]]''' was used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and staffed by [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healers]]. Located on the lush [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[H'ratth]], this praxeum was a premiere academy that taught the [[Force healing/Legends|healing arts]].

==History==
An ancient facility, this academy specialized in the instruction of the healing arts. As of [[4001 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Chamma]] served as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the facility; [[Andur Sunrider]] was one of his prized students.<ref name="Tales of the Jedi Companion">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref> Closed during the [[Jedi Civil War]], the facility reopened following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TJP" />

According to [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious's]] notes in his stolen copy of ''[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]]'', the H'ratth academy was one of many that he had destroyed during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. He remarked that the book itself revealed the academy's supposedly hidden location, saving the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] time as they hunted Jedi.
